query:
SELECT ms.id, ms.alunoId, ms.consultorId, ms.sessionDate, ms.sessionNumber, c.name AS mentorName
FROM mentoring_sessions ms 
LEFT JOIN consultors c ON ms.consultorId = c.id
WHERE ms.alunoId = 30100
ORDER BY ms.sessionDate DESC
LIMIT 10;
